profile_route.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-pass174-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|pinv_256x128_f64|svd_48x48_f64|eig_48x48_f64)' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --noplot

lever.description: Replace manual 8-lane f64 Simd construction from a contiguous B-panel slice with the standard safe slice-load helper in the existing exact-order MR4/NR8 GEMM microkernel.

initial_pre_edit_baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf44-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --noplot
initial_pre_edit_baseline.note: Not paired with the candidate worker; retained as pre-edit baseline evidence only.

same_worker_old_source_baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf44-oldpair cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --noplot

candidate_slice_load.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf44-candidate cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --noplot

proof.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf44-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture

isomorphism.ordering_and_tie_breaking: not applicable beyond deterministic row/panel traversal, which is unchanged
isomorphism.floating_point_surface: candidate only changed lane load construction; all arithmetic, NaN propagation, Inf behavior, and signed-zero behavior remained covered by bit-identical matmul tests

decision.reason: Same-worker candidate regressed GEMM2048 from 314.91 ms median to 365.91 ms median.
decision.next_primitive: Stop GEMM SIMD lane-load microtuning. Reprofile restored source and route to a different structural primitive or the explicit FP-tolerance contract work needed to unlock recursive/communication-avoiding GEMM.
